title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 21 June 2024
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 21 June 2024
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 21 June 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 21/06/2024
The four key ship recycling destinations are currently facing various challenges and market conditions. In India, the local market remains unfavorable and negative
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2024-06-21_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-15-June-21-June-2024_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
15 June - 21 June 2024
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
The four key ship recycling destinations are currently facing various challenges and market conditions. In India, the local market remains unfavorable and
negative, with no demand for steel from vessels and a daily decline in the local steel market.
